mapper.select: /* wms-outbound-obConfirmManager-sql-oracle.xml - selectPickingDetailListByPickingConfirmed - PICKTO -> PICKBACK 이동 대상LIST 조회 */ SELECT CTKEY ,OWKEY ,IVATKEY ,LCKEY ,ICKEY ,CNFRMQTY ,OBCNFRMQTY ,PIHDKEY ,PIDTKEY ,OBHDKEY ,OBDTKEY ,CNFRMQTY - OBCNFRMQTY - RVSQTY AS REMAINQTY FROM TWORK_INFO_PI_DT WHERE CTKEY = #{ctkey} AND OWKEY = #{owkey} AND PIHDKEY = #{pihdkey} AND OBHDKEY = #{obhdkey} AND OBDTKEY = #{obdtkey} AND (CNFRMQTY - OBCNFRMQTY - RVSQTY) > 0 AND PKDTWKSTATUSCD = '10' ORDER BY IVATKEY, LCKEY

/* wms-outbound-obConfirmManager-sql-oracle.xml - selectPickingTotalDetailListForPickingFailed - 피킹실패 대상 색인(총량피킹) */ SELECT PTD.CTKEY ,PTD.OWKEY ,PTD.PIHDKEY ,PTD.ICKEY ,PTD.IVATKEY ,PTD.LCKEY ,PTD.CELLKEY ,IC.ICUNITKEY ,PTD.UOM ,(PTD.EXPCTQTY - PTD.PKFAILQTY) - PTD.CNFRMQTY AS NONPKQTY ,PTD.LCKEY AS FRLCKEY ,PTD.LCKEY AS FRCELLKEY ,'PICKFAIL' AS TOLCKEY ,'PICKFAIL' AS TOCELLKEY FROM TWORK_INFO_PI_TOT_DT PTD INNER JOIN TWORK_INFO_IVAT IVAT ON PTD.CTKEY = IVAT.CTKEY AND PTD.OWKEY = IVAT.OWKEY AND PTD.IVATKEY = IVAT.IVATKEY INNER JOIN TWORK_MST_IC IC ON PTD.CTKEY = IC.CTKEY AND PTD.OWKEY = IC.OWKEY AND PTD.ICKEY = IC.ICKEY WHERE PTD.CTKEY = #{ctkey} AND PTD.OWKEY = #{owkey} AND PTD.PIHDKEY = #{pihdkey} AND PTD.ICKEY = #{ickey} AND (PTD.EXPCTQTY - PTD.PKFAILQTY) - PTD.CNFRMQTY > 0 /* 피킹실패 처리가 가능한 건 */ AND PTD.PKWKSTATUSCD = '10' ORDER BY PTD.IVATKEY, PTD.LCKEY

/* wms-outbound-obConfirmManager-sql-oracle.xml - selectPickingDetailListForPickingFailed - 피킹상세 LIST for 이고출고 PICKFAIL처리 */ SELECT PIDT.CTKEY ,PIDT.OWKEY ,PIDT.PIHDKEY ,PIDT.ICKEY ,PIDT.IVATKEY ,PIDT.LCKEY ,PIDT.CELLKEY ,IC.ICUNITKEY ,PIDT.UOM ,(PIDT.EXPCTQTY - PIDT.CNFRMQTY) AS NONPKQTY ,PIDT.FROMLCKEY AS FRLCKEY ,PIDT.FROMCELLKEY AS FRCELLKEY ,'PICKFAIL' AS TOLCKEY ,'PICKFAIL' AS TOCELLKEY ,PIDT.PIDTKEY ,PIDT.OBHDKEY ,PIDT.OBDTKEY FROM TWORK_INFO_PI_DT PIDT INNER JOIN TWORK_MST_IC IC ON PIDT.CTKEY = IC.CTKEY AND PIDT.OWKEY = IC.OWKEY AND PIDT.ICKEY = IC.ICKEY WHERE PIDT.CTKEY = #{ctkey} AND PIDT.OWKEY = #{owkey} AND PIDT.PIHDKEY = #{pihdkey} AND PIDT.OBHDKEY = #{obhdkey} AND PIDT.OBDTKEY = #{obdtkey} AND (PIDT.EXPCTQTY - PIDT.CNFRMQTY) > 0 AND PIDT.PKDTWKSTATUSCD = '10' ORDER BY PIDT.IVATKEY ,PIDT.LCKEY

/* wms-outbound-obConfirmManager-sql-oracle.xml - selectPickingDetailListByOutboundConfirmed - 출고확정에 의한 PICKTO 재고차감 대상 조회 */ SELECT CTKEY ,OWKEY ,IVATKEY ,LCKEY ,ICKEY ,(CNFRMQTY - OBCNFRMQTY - RVSQTY) AS SUBQTY ,PIHDKEY ,PIDTKEY ,OBHDKEY ,OBDTKEY FROM TWORK_INFO_PI_DT WHERE CTKEY = #{ctkey} AND OWKEY = #{owkey} AND PIHDKEY = #{pihdkey} AND OBHDKEY = #{obhdkey} AND OBDTKEY = #{obdtkey} AND (CNFRMQTY - OBCNFRMQTY - RVSQTY) > 0 AND PKDTWKSTATUSCD = '10' ORDER BY IVATKEY, LCKEY

/* wms-outbound-obConfirmManager-sql-oracle.xml - selectOutboundHeaderForInterfaceSend - 출고헤더 / 출고마감 IF 송신 데이터 조회 */ SELECT CTKEY ,OWKEY ,OBHDKEY ,OBORDKEY ,ORHDKEY ,DLVRYCORPCD ,WBLNO ,OBSTATUSCD ,COALESCE(WKTYPECD, 'ET') AS WKTYPECD FROM TWORK_INFO_OB_HD WHERE CTKEY = #{ctkey} AND OWKEY = #{owkey} AND OBHDKEY = #{obhdkey} AND OBDDLNSNDRSLTCD = '00'

/* wms-outbound-obConfirmManager-sql-oracle.xml - selectPickingInstructedOutboundDetailByIckey - 피킹지시된 출고상세정보 조회 BY ICKEY */ SELECT PD.CTKEY ,PD.OWKEY ,PD.OBHDKEY ,PD.OBDTKEY ,PD.ICKEY ,PD.PIHDKEY FROM TWORK_INFO_PI_DT PD WHERE PD.CTKEY = #{ctkey} AND PD.OWKEY = #{owkey} AND PD.OBHDKEY = COALESCE(#{pkobhdkey}, #{obhdkey}) AND PD.ICKEY = #{ickey} GROUP BY PD.CTKEY ,PD.OWKEY ,PD.OBHDKEY ,PD.OBDTKEY ,PD.ICKEY ,PD.PIHDKEY

/* wms-outbound-obConfirmManager-sql-oracle.xml - selectMoveOutboundHeaderForInterfaceSend - 출고마감 IF 송신 데이터 조회 BY 이고출고 용기별마감 상세정보 */ SELECT OD.ORDTKEY ,MAX(OD.OBCNFRMDATE) AS OBCNFRMDATE ,OD.ICKEY ,OD.UOM ,SUM(MCDT.QTY) AS EXPCTQTY ,SUM(MCDT.QTY) AS CNFRMQTY FROM TWORK_INFO_OB_HD OH INNER JOIN TWORK_INFO_OB_DT OD /*출고 상세 정보*/ ON OH.CTKEY = OD.CTKEY AND OH.OWKEY = OD.OWKEY AND OH.OBHDKEY = OD.OBHDKEY INNER JOIN TWORK_INFO_MVOB_CNTR_DT MCDT /*이고 용기 상세 정보*/ ON OD.CTKEY = MCDT.CTKEY AND OD.OWKEY = MCDT.OWKEY AND OD.OBHDKEY = MCDT.OBHDKEY AND OD.OBDTKEY = MCDT.OBDTKEY INNER JOIN TWORK_INFO_MVOB_CNTR MC /*이고 용기 정보*/ ON MCDT.CTKEY = MC.CTKEY AND MCDT.OWKEY = MC.OWKEY AND MCDT.OBHDKEY = MC.OBHDKEY AND MCDT.CNTRBARCODE = MC.CNTRBARCODE WHERE OH.CTKEY = #{ctkey} AND OH.OWKEY = #{owkey} AND OH.OBHDKEY = #{obhdkey} AND MC.MVOBGRPNO = #{mvobgrpno} AND MC.CNTRBARCODE = #{cntrbarcode} GROUP BY OD.CTKEY ,OD.OWKEY ,OD.ORHDKEY ,OD.ORDTKEY ,OD.ICKEY ,OD.UOM ,OD.EXPCTQTY ORDER BY OD.ORHDKEY ,OD.ORDTKEY
